summary: P0 Product Sales with sale_id feature testing completed. All backend APIs (9/9 tests) and frontend features working correctly. Sales create linked activities via sale_id, SaleEditModal opens for grouped editing, and delete removes all linked activities.

minor.issue: Activities created from product sales don't have fiscal_year_id set - they won't appear in fiscal year filtered views
minor.recommendation: Add fiscal_year_id to activities based on sale date or current fiscal year

action_items: Add fiscal_year_id to activities created from product sales endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: Product sales endpoint (/api/products/{id}/sales) should set fiscal_year_id on created activities to ensure they appear in fiscal year filtered views
seed_data_creation: Updated 32 existing sale activities with fiscal_year_id for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product sales with sale_id feature fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_product_sales.py cover all CRUD operations. Frontend tested: ProductSaleModal opens from Scope 3 Aval categories, SaleEditModal opens when clicking on sale activities, grouped update/delete works correctly. Note: Activities need fiscal_year_id to appear in fiscal year filtered views.

POST /api/products/{id}/sales.details: Creates sale with unique sale_id, creates linked activities (transformation, usage, disposal based on emissions)

GET /api/products/{id}/sales.details: Returns list of sales with sale_id and linked_activities_count

GET /api/products/{id}/sales/{sale_id}.details: Returns sale details with all linked activities

PUT /api/products/{id}/sales/{sale_id}.details: Updates sale quantity/date and recalculates all linked activities

DELETE /api/products/{id}/sales/{sale_id.details: Deletes sale and all linked activities

ProductSaleModal.details: Opens when clicking on transformation_produits, utilisation_produits, or fin_vie_produits categories

SaleEditModal.details: Opens when clicking edit on sale activities (activities with sale_id), shows linked activities count, allows quantity/date update

ShoppingBag_badge.details: Purple badge with ShoppingBag icon appears in Actions column for sale activities

Grouped_update.details: Updating quantity recalculates emissions for all linked activities

Grouped_delete.details: Delete confirmation shows count of linked activities, deletes all on confirm
